task_completion.description: Verify that the Recurring Revenues feature is enabled in Odoo CRM settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Odoo CRM Configuration Settings, the checkbox next to 'Recurring Revenues' should be checked or toggled on.

task_completion.description: Verify that a recurring plan named 'Quarterly' with a 3-month duration was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Recurring Plans list or form view, there should be a plan named 'Quarterly' with the 'Number of months' (or duration) set to 3.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new opportunity named 'Apex Logic - Enterprise Bundle' is created for the customer 'Apex Logic'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An opportunity form or pipeline card should display the title 'Apex Logic - Enterprise Bundle' and the customer/organization field should show 'Apex Logic'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the expected one-time revenue for the opportunity is set to 2,500.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the opportunity form, the 'Expected Revenue' field should display the value 2,500 (or 2500.00).

task_completion.description: Verify that the recurring revenue is set to 600 and the recurring plan is 'Quarterly'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the opportunity form, the 'Recurring Revenue' field should display 600 (or 600.00) and the adjacent recurring plan dropdown/field should be set to 'Quarterly'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Odoo web GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the standard Odoo 17 CRM layout, not a text editor or a mockup.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use direct database queries to insert the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of psql, pgAdmin, or python scripts manipulating the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Plan Name: 'Quarterly', Expected Plan Duration: 3 months, Expected Opportunity Name: 'Apex Logic - Enterprise Bundle', Expected One-time Revenue: 2500.0, Expected Recurring Revenue: 600.0.
